data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] /dso:create-bug skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill references bug-report-template.md
  Verify: grep -q 'bug-report-template' plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill uses .claude/scripts/dso shim (not direct plugin paths)
  Verify: grep -q '.claude/scripts/dso' plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill does not add --tags CLI_user by default
  Verify: { grep -q 'CLI_user' plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md && grep -q 'do not\|does not\|should not\|only.*calling agent' plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md; } || ! grep -q 'CLI_user' plugins/dso/skills/create-bug/SKILL.md; true
